Defendant SANDEE LOWE (Tel: 415-573-5301) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A.'s Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

The Court indicates the defendant did not properly contest the court's tentative ruling and notify plaintiff of her intent to appear today.

Matter discussed.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.
